text: erroneous food beliefs. POINTS TO PONDER 70 Guideline 13 Why do we need water? When is water considered safe and wholesome ? How is water rendered safe ? Drink plenty of water and take beverages in moderation Rationale: Water is the major constituent of the human body. /c118Beverages are useful to relieve thirst and to meet fluid requirements of the body. /c118Some beverages provide nutrients while others act as stimulants. /c118Milk is an excellent beverage for all age groups as it is a rich source of nutrients. Water accounts for 70% of our body weight. It is a constituent of blood and other vital body fluids. Water plays a key role in elimination of body wastes and regulation of body temperature. The body loses water through sweat, urine and faeces. This loss must be constantly made
